title: Fig. 2 in Two parthenogenetic millipede species/lines of the genus Poratia Cook & Cook, 1894 (Diplopoda, Polydesmida, Pyrgodesmidae) found free from Wolbachia bacteria
author: Witzel, K.-P.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. Agarose gel picture showing PCR analysis of Poratia DNA using general eubacterial primers, with a band corresponding to 1459 pairs of nucleotides (eubacteria) being particularly distinct.
steps_raw: Fig. 2. Agarose gel picture showing PCR analysis of Poratia DNA using general eubacterial primers, with a band corresponding to 1459 pairs of nucleotides (eubacteria) being particularly distinct.
